name: io.github.zowe/zowe-mcp-server
title: Zowe MCP Server
description: MCP server providing AI tools for z/OS — data sets, jobs, and USS via SSH or mock filesystem.

arguments.description: Use filesystem mock backend (no z/OS required). Set ZOWE_MCP_MOCK_DIR to the mock data directory.
Use native z/OS backend over SSH. Requires ZOWE_MCP_CREDENTIALS or ZOWE_MCP_PASSWORD_<USER>_<HOST> credentials.

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_MOCK_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Absolute path to the mock data directory generated by `npx @zowe/mcp-server init-mock --output <dir>`. Required when using --mock.

environmentVariables.name: ZOWE_MCP_CREDENTIALS
environmentVariables.description: JSON object mapping connection specs (user@host) to passwords. Example: {"jsmith@mainframe.example.com":"s3cret"}. Used with --native.
